description: Case style: Analogue watch with a stainless steel circular caseDial style: White dial with steel toned and black markings, steel toned hands with glow-in-the-dark feature and branding on the dialFeatures: Screw and push buttons to reset the time and chronograph, date display near the 3 hour mark, three face chronograph displayStrap style: Steel toned bracelet style strap with a butterfly closureWater resistance up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year from date of purchase, against manufacturing defects
